name: g15_transport_state_machine
purpose: Canonical lifted transport law for the G30 -> G15 projection, intended to anchor the transport-shell rendering and prevent drift.
core_claim: The true transport walk is a G30 lifted-state walk. The visible G15 walk is its forgetful shadow.

phase.meaning: subjective/objective style toggle retained in the lifted state

sheet.meaning: lift/sign/orientation memory retained by G30 and forgotten by G15

forgetful_projection.statement: G15 is the quotient shadow of G30 obtained by forgetting sheet memory.

walk_g15_once.action: one full 15-step traversal in the lifted machine

first_walk.statement: The first full walk reaches the corresponding position on the inverse face but does not yet restore orientation identity.
first_walk.lift_meaning: frame projects to the same G15 position class while sheet flips

second_walk.statement: The second full walk corrects the orientation defect and restores identity.
second_walk.lift_meaning: frame and sheet are both restored

distinguished_anchor.label: v0
distinguished_anchor.meaning: stairs midpoint / cube centroid in cube lens

stairs_principle.statement: The stairs are the distinguished overlap region where sheet memory is most legible.

walk_reading.cube_lens: The walk starts on the stairs, reaches the inverse-face counterpart after one full walk, and returns orientation-corrected after the second full walk.

render_contract.shell_page_rule: Do not render the transport shell as a pure G15 vertex walk when the intended law depends on sheet memory.

cocycle_relation.statement: The cocycle is the transition law carried by the lift/sign memory on overlaps and loops. It is companion data to the quadratic theorem object, not a consequence of Q = M M^T.

anti_drift_rules: Do not treat the transport walk as a G15-only state machine.
Do not treat one full G15 traversal as identity-restoring.
Do not erase sheet memory when specifying the true transport law.
Do not confuse the lifted state machine with its G15 projection.
Do not let shell-page heuristics override the lifted-state law.
implementation_priority: Use this state machine as the transport source of truth.
Treat theorem_object.json as the exact kernel anchor for M and Q.
Treat transport_shell_grammar.json as the visual shell anchor.
Treat transport_cocycle.json as the overlap/transition anchor.
Use the present file to bind those layers into one lifted walk law.
